name: medium-power
description: A use-case-driven development workflow for coding agents, focused on plan-gated integration tests and reviewable delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Use-case-driven development workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Medium Power is an experimental Codex plugin that replaces scattered function-level TDD pressure with plan-gated use-case flows, use-case-level integration tests, focused implementation, and review checkpoints.
defaultPrompt: Let's build this through a use-case-driven plan.
Help me implement this with use-case-level tests.
